rationale.R1.2: The critique thoroughly identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides detailed repairs, covering the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainties are clearly flagged for each recommendation, such as sparse-grid rates and quasi-uniformity results.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions introduced; critique is constructive.
rationale.RX.5: Every major change is annotated with sources and reasons, ensuring traceability.
